scenario: presentationFor('workflow') — renderer + action for the markdown workflow and the YAML program. Both are type=workflow but render via different renderers. Mirrors renderer/all-types.json's byRelPath shape. SPECIFICATION golden.
adapterStatus: NOT IMPLEMENTED — spec-authored target (future Chunk-2 format-adapter work item).
specSource: docs/architecture/specs/akm-0.9.0-bundle-adapter-spec.md §2 / §3.4; src/core/type-presentation.ts TYPE_PRESENTATION['workflow'] (renderer 'workflow-md', action buildWorkflowAction). The workflow-program-yaml renderer form is selected by the adapter for the YAML program (src/workflows/renderer.ts).
realWorldSource: AKM-native; mirrors the frozen renderer/all-types.json workflow + workflow-program-yaml entries
notes: SPECIFICATION golden. TYPE_PRESENTATION keys `workflow` to renderer 'workflow-md' with buildWorkflowAction. The YAML program form additionally has its own renderer name 'workflow-program-yaml' (the adapter picks it for the program form) — same `type`, same action, different renderer, exactly as the frozen all-types renderer golden documents.
action = buildWorkflowAction(ref) = "Resume the active run or start a new run with `akm workflow next '<ref>'`." (src/core/type-presentation.ts).

release.md.label: Workflow
release.md.action: Resume the active run or start a new run with `akm workflow next 'sample-akm-workflow//release'`.

deploy.yaml.label: Workflow
deploy.yaml.action: Resume the active run or start a new run with `akm workflow next 'sample-akm-workflow//deploy'`.
deploy.yaml.note: same type + action as the markdown form; renderer differs (program form).
